title: Fox Thigh highs
description: Gives foxes a little more color.
body:
Makes foxes more colorful. Foxes will have pink thigh highs and arm warmers. Has both snowy & normal variants. If optifine is installed, colors will be randomized.

## Vanilla
![](https://butts-are.cool/2021-11-14_18.05.43.png)

## With Optifine
